title: The First, the Second, the Third
description: Ordinal numbers (1st, 2nd, 3rd…). How to say a date in English. And the weird ones — first, second, third, fifth, ninth, twelfth.
summary_pt_br: Números ordinais em inglês: 1st first, 2nd second, 3rd third, 4th fourth, 5th fifth, 9th ninth, 12th twelfth. Para datas: 'the + ordinal + of + month' (UK) ou 'month + ordinal' (US).

scenes.text_en:
'My birthday is on the TWENTY-FIRST of September.'
'Today is the FIRST of May.'
'The exam is on the TWELFTH of July.'
US style: 'May FIRST.' UK style: 'The FIRST of May.' Both correct.
scenes.text_pt:
'Meu aniversário é 21 de setembro.'
'Hoje é 1º de maio.'
'A prova é 12 de julho.'
Estilo EUA: 'May first.' Estilo UK: 'The first of May.' Ambos corretos.

scenes.title: The -TH rule + exceptions
scenes.body_en: Most ordinals: base + TH. Four → fourth. Six → sixth. Seven → seventh. Ten → tenth. Exceptions: 1st, 2nd, 3rd are totally different. 5th = fifth (not fiveth). 9th = ninth (drop the 'e'). 12th = twelfth (not twelveth). 20th = twentieth (-y becomes -ieth).
scenes.body_pt: Regra: número + TH. Exceções: 1st/2nd/3rd (irregulares). 5th = fifth (não 'fiveth'). 9th = ninth (cai o 'e'). 12th = twelfth. 20th = twentieth.

exercise.question: Which is a correct date?
exercise.explanation: UK: 'the first of May'. US: 'May first'. Either works.

scenes.title: Birthday planning
scenes.pt_summary: Datas e números ordinais — first, second, third, twenty-first.

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: Hi! My birthday is coming up. Guess when?
turns.pt: Oi! Meu aniversário tá chegando. Advinha quando?

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: Yes! Can you guess the date?

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: Is it on the fifteenth of June?

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: Close. It is on the twenty-first of June.

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: That is the first day of winter.

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: Exactly. What day of the week is it this year?
turns.pt: Exato. Que dia da semana cai esse ano?

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: Perfect. Can you come to my party?
turns.pt: Perfeito. Pode vir na minha festa?

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: Yes, I would love to come.

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: Awesome. See you on the twenty-first!

scenes.title: Recap reading
scenes.passage_en: At Amazing School, the class just finished "The First, the Second, the Third". Ordinal numbers (1st, 2nd, 3rd…). How to say a date in English. And the weird ones — first, second, third, fifth, ninth, twelfth. Mr. Kumar reminded the students that practice is the key — listen, read aloud, write your own examples. Every small step adds up. The ocean in Praia do Sol keeps moving, and so does your English.

check.question: According to Mr. Kumar, what is the key to learning?
check.explanation: Practice — listen, read aloud, write your own examples.
check.hint_pt_br: A chave é a prática: ouvir, ler em voz alta, escrever seus próprios exemplos.

scenes.title: Listen to Bia
scenes.audio_text_en: Hello! I'm Bia, from Praia do Sol. Today in class we studied "The First, the Second, the Third". I liked it because it was clear and short. Tomorrow we will practice again. See you then!

check.question: What did Bia study today?
options: A grammar rule about the past
The First, the Second, the Third
check.explanation: She says: "Today in class we studied 'The First, the Second, the Third'".
check.hint_pt_br: Ela fala claramente o título: "The First, the Second, the Third".

scenes.title: Go deeper — free resources
scenes.body_pt: Fontes gratuitas e confiáveis para você estudar mais. Salve os links e volte sempre.

sources.label: British Council · A1
sources.pt_hint: Diálogos A1 do British Council, com áudio.

sources.label: BBC Learning English · Beginners
sources.pt_hint: Curso gratuito da BBC, nível iniciante.
